svg.text: Updated Architecture v2.0 · 6-Layer Multi-Domain Ensemble · 12 Subsystems · 15.1M+ Data Points · 273 System Variables
12 distinct physical subsystems · Heterogeneous multi-modal sensor streams
23 flight params: GPS alt, pitch, vert accel, fatigue
Heterogeneous multi-modal data routing into specialized ingestion pipelines
Modality-specific pipelines · Domain adaptation · Imbalanced class handling
Parallel specialized models per subsystem · Domain-adapted · Cross-attention fusion
Cross-domain correlation · False-alarm filtering · Confidence-calibrated scoring
Onboard edge AI · ACARS downlink · React Three Fiber ground station
Pipeline: Ingestion → Feature Eng → ML Ensemble → Anomaly Engine → Edge → Viz
C-MAPSS · UCI Hydraulic · AeroTwin · NGAFID-MC · MaintNet · HIRF · ADAPT · CFRP
